user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter employee current status by location, so that I can review employees at a specific site
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Current Status screen; When I select a location and click Search; Then the list shows employees for that location

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter by department, so that I can review the current status of a team
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Current Status screen; When I select a department and click Search; Then the results are filtered to that department

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to search by project name or employee name, so that I can quickly locate a specific person
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Current Status screen; When I enter a project or employee name and click Search; Then matching employees are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of department, position level, employee name and current status, so that I can assess workforce availability
acceptance_criteria: Given I have run a search; When results load; Then each row shows Department, Position level, Employee name and Employee Current Status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset my filters, so that I can start a new search from scratch
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Employee Current Status screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters are cleared to defaults
